---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: hero-wrapper
::: hero-text
# Connor Conkey-Morrison

::: hero-tags
[PhD Candidate]{.tag} [Provisional Psychologist]{.tag} [Sessional Academic]{.tag}
:::

::: hero-bio
Research on school attendance problems, emotionally based school avoidance, and adolescent mental health. My work draws on intervention evidence, longitudinal modelling, and population-level education data.
:::

::: hero-links
[Research →](pages/esearch.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-primary} [Teaching & Roles →](pages/teaching.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-secondary} [Contact →](pages/contact.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::

::: hero-photo
![Connor Conkey-Morrison](images/crop_27A5334.jpg){.profile-img}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
## About

I am a PhD candidate at RMIT University and a provisional psychologist. My research focuses on school attendance problems, emotionally based school avoidance, and adolescent mental health --- with particular interests in intervention evidence, developmental patterns of disengagement, and the use of large-scale administrative and longitudinal data.

Alongside research, I work across teaching, student support, and school-based practice.
:::

::: cards-grid
::: card
### Research & Publications

Current work on school attendance problems, intervention evidence, and developmental trajectories. Includes peer-reviewed publications from 2024--2025.

[View research →](pages/research.qmd)
:::

::: card
### Teaching & Roles

Teaching across undergraduate and postgraduate psychology at RMIT and Cairnmillar, alongside clinical and school-based practice.

[View teaching & roles →](pages/teaching.qmd)
:::

::: card
### CV & Contact

Current appointments, education history, and contact details.

[View CV & contact →](pages/contact.qmd)
:::
:::
